title: Plutarch, Moralia: On the Eating of Flesh II
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On the Eating of Flesh II.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On the Eating of Flesh II.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'On the Eating of Flesh II': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
